title: Canadian Noodle Stir Fry
description: A simple and quick stir fry recipe using Canadian noodles and your favorite vegetables.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the broccoli and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the bell peppers and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
Add the Canadian noodles and stir to combine with the vegetables.
In a small bowl, whisk together the fish sauce and soy sauce.
Pour the sauce over the noodles and vegetables, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.
